skills.name: agent-lifecycle-manager
skills.description: Manage the lifecycle of sub-agents: create or update agent packages, validate cross-surface agent contracts, evaluate routing behavior, tighten invocation boundaries, tune Codex runtime defaults, install or publish agents, or audit an agent library. Use only when the request is explicitly about agents or agent libraries, not for ordinary coding, implementation, or general project planning.

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Transform ideas into validated decisions through structured, scope-adaptive collaborative dialogue across all domains: software, product, business strategy, market analysis, and open-ended exploration. Features domain-adaptive thinking frameworks, five universal thinking moves, and proportional output formats.

skills.name: business-plan
skills.description: Comprehensive business planning, financial analysis, market analysis, pitch deck creation, strategic review, and valuation. Adapts to business stage (idea through mature) and scale (solopreneur through enterprise).

skills.name: clarify
skills.description: Structured framework for detecting ambiguity and asking hypothesis-driven clarifying questions before acting. Must consult when requests lack specifics needed to act correctly.

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Conduct comprehensive, citation-backed web research with multi-phase pipeline, parallel execution, anti-hallucination protocols, and structured report generation.

skills.name: editorial-review
skills.description: Comprehensive editorial review for Chinese content before publication, covering typos, grammar, punctuation, fact-checking, political compliance, and advertising law.

skills.name: git-worktree-workflows
skills.description: Guide and execute safe git worktree workflows for parallel branches, isolated review checkouts, comparison, cleanup, and repair without baking repo-specific bootstrap habits into the default path.

skills.name: prompt-engineering
skills.description: Master prompt engineering and context engineering for LLMs: drafting, testing, optimizing, securing, and scaling prompts across Claude, GPT, Gemini, and open-source models in production.

skills.name: readme-craftsman
skills.description: Generate, update, or review README.md files with deep codebase analysis, project-type-aware templates, and quality validation. Covers OSS libraries, web services, CLI tools, personal projects, internal tools, monorepos, and config directories.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Perform thorough, structured reviews on PRs, diffs, code, documentation, architecture designs, PRDs, API specs, and configuration changes with severity-graded findings and actionable suggestions.

skills.name: skill-lifecycle-manager
skills.description: Manage the lifecycle of agent skills: discover patterns, create or update a skill, validate it, evaluate it, project or install it, or audit a skill library. Use only when the request is explicitly about skills or skill libraries, not for general code tasks or agent management.

skills.name: skill-researcher
skills.description: Survey community skills, require candidate confirmation before deeper analysis, and produce structured fusion reports as handoff artifacts for downstream skill creation.

agents.name: debugger
agents.description: Systematic debugging agent that diagnoses bugs, test failures, and unexpected behavior through hypothesis-driven investigation.

agents.name: docs-researcher
agents.description: Documentation-backed research agent for verifying APIs, SDKs, frameworks, and libraries against official sources.

agents.name: explorer
agents.description: Use when a task needs fast read-only codebase mapping, evidence gathering, impact analysis, or file and symbol discovery before implementation or review.

agents.name: implementer
agents.description: Code implementation agent that writes, modifies, and refactors code based on plans, specs, or direct instructions.

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Architecture and implementation planning agent that designs step-by-step plans with trade-off analysis.

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Web research agent for deep investigation, multi-source verification, and structured report generation.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Code review agent that performs structured, severity-graded reviews on PRs, diffs, and code changes.
